Model_use: Reference configuration for normalisation and comparison
Cost denominator for normalisation and S2 percentage comparison
Carbon denominator for normalisation and S2 percentage comparison
Time denominator for normalisation and S2 percentage comparison

Value: model-calculated CFS framing reference, not measured commercial data
CFS framing process cost: steel material + factory processing + site installation labour + setup + transport + delivery/logistics + mobilisation + waste handling + overhead.
CFS framing carbon: A1-A3 steel + A4 transport + factory energy + A5 site installation + waste allowance. Whole-building carbon is outside scope.
Total construction process hours: factory production + setup + delivery/logistics + site installation + site mobilisation. Not calendar duration.
